tests.name: SOR: all packs have 16 cards
SOR: all packs have exactly 1 leader
SOR: all packs have exactly 1 common base
SOR: all packs have exactly 1 foil
SOR: no duplicate base treatment cards within any pack
SOR: all packs have exactly 9 commons (non-foil)
SOR: packs have 2 or 3 uncommons (non-foil, depending on upgrade)
SOR: packs have 1 or 2 rare/legendary/special in non-foil slots
SOR: when UC slot upgrades, counts are consistent
SOR: duplicate distribution across pods is reasonable
SOR: triplicate distribution across pods is reasonable
SOR: number of 2σ outliers is statistically reasonable
SOR: HS+Normal same-leader rate should be within expected range
SOR: card+foil pairs within single packs should be rare (ideal < 5%)
SOR: card+foil pairs within sealed pods should be uncommon (acceptable < 100%)
SOR: average card+foil pairs per pod should be reasonable (< 5)
SOR: duplicate rate (base treatment) statistically matches expected
SOR: duplicate rate (any treatment) statistically matches expected
SOR: triplicate rate (base treatment) statistically matches expected
SOR: triplicate rate (any treatment) statistically matches expected
SOR: legendary rate in R/L slot matches expected
SOR: hyperfoil rate matches expected (~2%)
SOR: showcase leader rate is plausible (~0.35%)
SOR: good card variety across all packs
SOR: leaders show good variety
